name: EIB EUR Digital Bond on HSBC Orion

regulator.name: Luxembourg CSSF (under Luxembourg blockchain law); BdF (Banque de France) for wCBDC settlement leg

summary: EUR 100M two-year digital bond issued by EIB on HSBC Orion private DLT, with settlement in central bank money via experimental wCBDC from Banque de France. Lead managers: HSBC, RBC Capital Markets, Santander. Significant as one of the first EUR digital bond issuances with full central bank money settlement (not just commercial bank money). Demonstrates EU regulatory framework (Luxembourg blockchain law) for tokenized debt + ECB experimentation with wholesale settlement.

sources.title: EIB press release on Orion bond issuance

underlying_asset: EIB unsecured senior debt obligation; two-year tenor.
secondary_market: Permissioned Orion network only; limited secondary trading among onboarded participants.
redemption_mechanism: Coupon and principal paid at maturity in central bank money via Banque de France wCBDC experimental settlement.
upgrade_authority: EIB issuance terms; HSBC operates platform.

timeline.event: EIB issues EUR 100M digital bond on HSBC Orion
Coupon payments completed via wCBDC experimental settlement
